data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of being weather-dependent with a cancellation policy. However, the evidence indicates that only 2 customers have booked, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants needed for the tour to proceed. This gap in participant numbers prevents a full assessment of the cancellation policy, as the tour cannot be confirmed or cancelled based on weather conditions without meeting the minimum participant threshold.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
